sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, name String, start_date Date, interval_months String);
SELECT id, name, start_date + toIntervalMonth(toInt32(interval_months)) AS adjusted_date FROM test_data WHERE adjusted_date >= toDate('2023-10-01');
SELECT id, tupleElement((id, name), 1) AS entity_name, toIntervalMonth(4) + interval_months AS combined_interval FROM test_data;

SELECT id, interval_months, (SELECT COUNT() FROM test_data t2 WHERE t2.start_date <= start_date) AS predecessors FROM test_data HAVING predecessors > 1 ORDER BY toDate('2023-01-01') + toIntervalMonth(toInt32(interval_months));
CREATE TABLE test_data2 AS SELECT id, name, start_date, toIntervalMonth(-2) AS neg_interval FROM test_data;
INSERT INTO test_data2 SELECT id, name, start_date, 'InvalidInterval' FROM test_data WHERE name LIKE 'test%';
SELECT id, tupleElement((id, name, toIntervalMonth(0)), 2) AS interval_value FROM test_data2 WHERE interval_value IS NULL;
SELECT id, toIntervalMonth(1.5) + interval_months AS complex_interval FROM test_data2 WHERE toIntervalMonth(1.5) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, NULL + toIntervalMonth(4) AS null_interval, name FROM test_data2 WHERE id = 3;
